title: Device Forensics: MikroTik RouterOS — Live CLI
description: mkt-rb750 wasn't patched against CVE-2018-14847 Winbox bypass and now has a VPNFilter-style scheduler backdoor. Connect, walk `/system scheduler print`, `/system script print`, `/ip firewall nat print`.

hints.text: `connect mkt-rb750`. Slash-prefixed commands — every path ends in `print` to dump that section.
`/system scheduler print` shows scheduled jobs. The legit roster: conf-bkp / ssh-keep-alive / tmp-cleanup. Anything else is suspect.
`/system script print` shows the script body inline — including `/tool fetch url=` lines that name external hosts.
